semantic.role: Developer reference guide for the ArchSpine repository
responsibilities: Describing project structure and module organization under `src/`
Listing build, test, and development commands with Node.js 20+
Defining coding style, naming conventions, and linting expectations
Specifying testing guidelines using Vitest and bench fixtures
Recommending commit and pull request conventions (Conventional Commits)
Guiding documentation maintenance (English/Chinese alignment, public vs planning docs)
Providing ArchSpine-specific interaction rules (context files, protected outputs, sync workflow)
outOfScope: Architecture deep dives or design rationales beyond summary level

English.purpose: To provide a comprehensive set of guidelines for developers working on the ArchSpine repository, covering project structure, development workflow, coding conventions, and interaction with the ArchSpine system.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for developers (human and AI) who contribute to the ArchSpine project. It assumes familiarity with TypeScript, Node.js, and basic repository management.
key_takeaways: Follow the established coding style (ES modules, strict typing, 2-space indentation).
Use Conventional Commits for commits and PRs.
Keep English and Chinese documentation aligned.
Respect ArchSpine control-plane files and avoid direct modification of generated outputs.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 为在 ArchSpine 仓库工作的开发者提供一套全面的指南，涵盖项目结构、开发工作流、编码规范以及与 ArchSpine 系统的交互方式。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 本文档面向参与 ArchSpine 项目的开发者（人类和 AI 代理），假定读者熟悉 TypeScript、Node.js 以及基本的仓库管理知识。
key_takeaways: 理解 `src/` 下的模块组织结构。
遵循既定的编码风格（ES modules、严格类型、2个空格缩进）。
在提交和 PR 中使用 Conventional Commits 格式。
保持英文和中文文档的一致性。
尊重 ArchSpine 的控制平面文件，避免直接修改自动生成的输出文件。
